notes: Procedural frontier ring. The 20 charted worlds now have neighbors: 8-12 further worlds, procedurally generated and different every game, lie beyond the edge of the map. They're hidden like any other uncharted world — find them with your existing 🛰️ Deep-Space Survey — but reaching the frontier costs real fuel, and its factions, deposits and lawlessness are all rolled fresh each playthrough. Nothing about the charted 20 changes.
